roleList.hint: Maintain role definitions, permission scope, and user assignments.
roleList.tableHint: Filter roles by name, code, and type.
roleList.emptyDescription: No data matches the current filters. Clear filters or create a new record.
roleList.permissionLoadFailed: Failed to load the permission catalog. Showing roles only.
roleList.permissionUnavailable: No permission catalog is available for this session.
roleList.builtinHint: Builtin roles cannot be deleted and some fields stay read-only
roleList.moreBuiltinHint: Builtin roles cannot be deleted. Open details for the restrictions.
roleList.moreCustomHint: Additional role actions are not available yet

lifecycle.deleteReady: This custom role now satisfies the delete lifecycle rules.
lifecycle.deleteNeedsDisable: Disable this custom role before deleting it.
lifecycle.deleteNeedsBindingsCleared: Remove all user and permission bindings before deleting this role.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search role name, display name, or role code

form.builtinNotice: Builtin roles cannot be deleted. The role code stays read-only while other fields follow permissions.
form.name: Role Code

permissionDialog.title: Manage Role Permissions
permissionDialog.operationHelp: Overwrite Current Permissions replaces the role's current permissions with the current selection. Append Selected Permissions Only adds only the permissions selected this time. Remove Selected Permissions removes only the already assigned permissions selected this time.
permissionDialog.loadingSelection: Loading the current role permission snapshot
permissionDialog.searchPlaceholder: Search permission code, name, or description
permissionDialog.selectionLoadFailed: Failed to load the current role permissions. Retry before saving.
permissionDialog.selectionUnavailable: The current role permission snapshot is invalid, so overwrite save is blocked.
permissionDialog.unsavedChangesConfirm: Permission changes have not been saved. Discard them?

permissionList.hint: Review system permissions, module ownership, and authorization usage.
permissionList.tableHint: Filter permissions by name, code, and module.
permissionList.emptyFilteredDescription: No permissions match the current filters. Clear filters and try again.
permissionList.readonlyNotice: This permission list is currently read only.
permissionList.readonlyDescription: Permissions are registered by the system and plugins. This page shows permission points and module ownership.
permissionList.factSourceHint: Search for codes like `user.create` here to verify whether the permission is actually registered and how many roles currently use it.

userDisable.description: Allows disabling or deleting managed users.

userSessionRead.description: Allows reading active refresh sessions for a specified user.

userSessionRevoke.description: Allows revoking refresh sessions for a specified user.

roleDelete.description: Allows deleting custom roles that satisfy the lifecycle requirements.

monitorServerStatusRead.description: Allows reading the server status overview.

auditRead.description: Allows viewing the audit overview and audit logs.
